creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
Okay,


now i see it - there are knobs without a sense:

[ ] MAILNEWS
[ ] COMPOSER
[ ] LDAP

result: error (see above)


[ ] MAILNEWS
[ ] COMPOSER
[X] LDAP

result: error (see above)


[X] MAILNEWS
[ ] COMPOSER
[ ] LDAP

result: Message: "Port is broken"


[X] MAILNEWS
[ ] COMPOSER
[X] LDAP

result: it builds, but there is no usable mailclient. This is
"browser only" 


There are no shortcuts in the browser window (left side / bottom) to
open the mailclient. If you open the mailclient (e.g. via mailto) then
you cannot type/send/receive mails. It needs the composer.

[X] MAILNEWS
[X] COMPOSER
[X] LDAP

result: perfect

conclusion: that three knobs have no sense, because you have to set
them all to ON (or compile wihe unusable mailclient for browser only).

Heino
